case_title: CLARK TAYLOR VS. BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,177.87 (FILED AT LITIGANT'S REQUEST) FILED BY TAYLOR, CLARK AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-22-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAYLOR, CLARK ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE ON THE COURTS OWN MOTION TO SEP-13-19 AT 1:30 P.M. FOR ADDITIONAL DOCUMENTS TO BE PROVIDED BY BANK OF AMERICA. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT. NO APPEARANCES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-22-2019 - CONTINUED FOR TO SEP-13-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CLARK TAYLOR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, REPRESENTED BY JEFFREY JACKSON, OPERATION ANALYST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT, BANK OF AMERICA IS ORDERED TO BRING FULL AND COMPLETE RECORDS AS TO PLAINTIFF'S JOINT AND SINGULAR ACCOUNTS STARTING MAY-23-19 THROUGH AUG-23-19. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JEFFREY JACKSON, BANK OF AMERICA FILED BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DULCE MARROQUIN, OFFICER, CRT APPEARANCE ASSOCIATE. FILED BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

ORDER RE: SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT: PARTIES REACH A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO THE CALLING OF TODAYS MATTER. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA IS TO PAY PLAINTIFF CLARK TAYLOR AN AMOUNT OF $4000.00. A HEARING IS SET FOR A PROGRESS REPORT ON OCT-09-19 AT 1:30 P.M. IF PAYMENT IS MADE IN FULL, NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AND THE MATTER WILL BE TAKEN OFF-CALENDAR.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-09-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, REPRESENTED BY DULCE MARROWQUIN, OFFICER, CRT APPEARANCE ASSOCIATE IS PRESENT. PARTIES REACH A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO THE CALLING OF TODAYS MATTER. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA IS TO PAY PLAINTIFF CLARK TAYLOR AN AMOUNT OF $4000.00. A HEARING IS SET FOR A PROGRESS REPORT ON OCT-09-19 AT 1:30 P.M. IF PAYMENT IS MADE IN FULL, NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AND THE MATTER WILL BE TAKEN OFF-CALENDAR AS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE CASE SETTLED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
